name: .22 Rifle
description: Use: Fire a shot anywhere within your line of sight.

name: Air Horn
description: Side Quest Item. You are Ambushed every battle. Use to make some noise!

name: Alien Blaster
description: Use: A laser attack. Gains +1 damage for the rest of the battle each time it's used.

name: Alien Tech
description:
Use: Target an area. Unleash a hyper beam attack in that area at the start of your next turn.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: American Flag
description:
+1 Strength, +1 Dexterity, +1 Constitution, +1 Intelligence, +1 Speed, +1 Charisma, +1 Luck
Use: Force a unit to attack one of its enemies.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Amplified Air Horn
description:
Use: Apply Madness to a unit within 5 tiles in your line of sight.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Anarchist Cookbook
description: Use: Summon 3-5 grenades that explode at the end of the round or when destroyed.

name: Anointing Oil
description:
Use: Cleanse debuffs from an adjacent unit or yourself.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Arrow of Infinity
description:
Use: Your next basic attack has +5 range, +100% Crit Chance, ignores shield and can't miss.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Bag Of Chum
description: Use: Spawn a Charmed Maggot.

name: Bag o' Glass
description:
Use: Spawn Glass on an adjacent tile.
5% chance to break when used.

name: Bag o' Glitter
description:
Use: Inflict Blind 2 on an adjacent unit.
5% chance to break when used.

name: Bag o' Meat
description:
Use: Spawn Meat on an adjacent tile.
5% chance to break when used.

name: Bag o' Stuff
description:
Use: Spawn a random pickup on an adjacent tile.
5% chance to break when used.

name: Bag of Rocks
description: Use: A melee attack that inflicts Bruise.

name: Ball-Peen Hammer
description:
Use: A melee attack. If used on an ally, give +1 use to all of their items instead of dealing damage.
5% chance to break when used to repair items.

name: Barbed Paw
description:
-1 Constitution
Use: A melee attack that inflicts Bleed 1.
Passive: +1 Thorns.

name: Battery
description: Use: A ranged lightning attack with a 10% chance to Stun.

name: Battle Axe
description:
Use: A melee spin attack.
This uses up both your movement and attack action.

name: Bear Traps
description: Use: Place a Bear Trap.

name: Bent Spoon
description: Use: Pull any unit 1 tile toward you and deal 1 damage to it.

name: Big Spring
description: Use: Throw an adjacent unit to a tile.

name: Big Stick
description: Use: A melee attack with +2 reach.

name: Biggest Stick
description: Use: A melee attack with +3 reach.

name: Black Mushroom
description:
Use: A ranged attack that inflicts Weakness 2.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Black Shard
description:
Use: Absorb a unit with 1 or less health to power this item up.
Transforms after 20 absorptions.
(Saves its power across multiple runs.)
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Blackjack
description:
Use: A melee attack with a 5% chance to Stun.
Automatically use this when you stop next to an enemy or an enemy stops next to you.

name: Blessed Anointing Oil
description: Use: Cleanse debuffs and heal an adjacent unit or yourself.

name: Blood Bucket
description: Use: A lobbed attack that creates a creep puddle.

name: Bloody Bag of Glass
description: Use: Throw a projectile that creates glass.

name: Bloody Bear Traps
description: Use: Place a Bear Trap.

name: Bloody Knife
description:
Use: A multi-hit melee attack with Lifesteal that inflicts Bleed.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Bloody Meat Hook
description: Use: Pull a unit towards you, Cleaving and inflicting Bleed 1.

name: Bloody Soul Claw
description:
Use: A melee attack that deals damage equal to the number of uses this has left.
When this weapon kills a unit, it gains +2 uses and you heal 5 HP.

name: Bloody Spikes
description:
+1 Thorns.
Use: A ranged attack.

name: Bloody Stick
description:
+1 Health Regen.
Use: A melee attack with +1 reach.

name: Bo
description: Use: A melee attack. On hit, jump forward 2 tiles.

name: Bomb
description: Use: Throw a bomb that explodes.

name: Bone Club
description:
Use: A melee attack.
This weapon has a 15% chance to break each time it's used.

name: Book Of Belial
description:
Use: Gain +3 Damage.

name: Bottles
description: Use: A lobbed attack that spawns a glass tile.

name: Bottles of Blood
description: Use: A lobbed attack that creates glass tiles in an area.

name: Bricks
description:
Use: A lobbed attack that inflicts Stun.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Bubbles
description: Use: Throw a bubble with Wind and Water Element that inflicts Confusion.

name: Bucket of Blood
description: Use: Gain +2 Constitution and -1 Speed, then heal 4 HP.

name: Bucket of Lard
description: Use: Gain +2 Constitution and -1 Speed, then heal 4 HP.

name: Bug
description:
Your basic attack is Metronome.

name: Bunga's Bone
description: Use: A melee attack with Knockback 5.

description:
Use: A lobbed attack that inflicts Burn 2 and +2 Speed.

description: Use: A melee attack with Cleave that can hit diagonally.

name: Butterfly Knife
description:
Use: A multi-hit melee attack that inflicts Bleed.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Car Battery
description: Use: An Electric melee attack that has a 50% chance to chain to another enemy within 3 tiles. Can only be used while at full mana.

name: Cat Paw
description:
+2 Luck
Use: A melee attack that has a 25% chance to refresh itself when used.

name: Chainsaw
description:
Use: A multi-hit melee attack with a 25% chance to Cleave.
(Usable once per battle.)
Passive: +2 Thorns.

name: Charged Soul Dagger
description:
Use: A melee attack with Lifesteal. If this weapon damages an allied cat, gain one of their spells at random in your bonus ability slot.
Loses its Charge at the end of the battle.

name: Cheese
description: Use: Gain +1 Constitution and heal 2 HP.

name: Chum Bucket
description: Use: A lobbed attack that creates a creep puddle.

name: Creepy Photo
description:
Use: A melee attack that inflicts Fear 1.

name: Crisp Paper
description:
Use: A ranged attack that inflicts Bleed 3.

name: Crossbow
description: Use: A ranged attack that ignores shield and inflicts Bleed 1.

name: Crowbar
description: Use: A melee attack that destroys trash bags and crates, scattering extra pickups.

name: Death's Scythe
description: Use: A spin attack. After using this, die at the end of your turn.

name: Deathbot
description: Use: Spawn a Deathbot with a flamethrower.

name: Demon Core
description:
Start each battle with Poison 5. Inflict All Stats Down 2 on bosses and minibosses at the start of the battle.
Use: A melee attack that causes a unit to die at the end of its next turn. Bosses fall asleep at the end of their next turn instead.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Dry Ice
description: Use: An Ice Element melee attack that inflicts Slow.

name: Energy Drink
description: Use: Gain +1 Dexterity and +1 Speed.

name: Ether Soaked Rag
description:
Use: Put an adjacent unit or yourself to Sleep. That unit gets +5 Health Regen and +5 Mana Regen until it wakes up.

name: Extra Limb
description: An attack that copies your basic attack.

name: Fate
description: Use: Summon meteors that hit random tiles everywhere. These meteors have a chance to Stun, spawn fires, or leave rocks behind.

name: Feather Darts
description:
Use: A ranged attack that can hit any unit in your line of sight.
Can be used 3 times per turn.

name: Feathered Wing
description: Use: A wide Wind attack with Knockback 3.

name: Finger Bone
description:
Use: A straight ranged attack that inflicts Immobile 3.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Fire Flower
description:
Use: Shoot a fireball that inflicts Burn 2 in an area.

name: Flower Mix
description: Use: Plant flowers in a large area. (Usable once per battle)

name: Frayed Wires
description:
Use: An electric melee attack that can chain through adjacent units.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Gambit's Dice
description:
Use: Throw a projectile that deals 1-6 damage at random.
RELOAD: Cast a spell that costs exactly 6 mana.

name: Garbage
description: Use: A lobbed attack that inflicts Poison 1.

name: Geode
description:
Use: A melee attack with a 5% chance to break when used.
When it breaks, gain 15-30 coins.

name: Girder
description:
Use: A melee attack with Knockback 10 and Chain Knockback.
(Usable once per battle.)
Passive: +1 Brace while this weapon is usable.

name: Glass Cannon
description:
Side Quest Item. Fill the map with glass at the start of each battle.
Use: Shoot a glass ball.

name: Glass Cannon (Fixed)
description: Use: Shoot a glass ball anywhere.

name: Glowing Black Shard
description:
Stab it into The Coven!
Use: Deal 5 damage with Lifesteal, inflict Burn 5, and purge all buffs. Instantly kills The Coven.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Glowing Bone
description:
Mimics a class spell.
Will use it as its description.

name: Gnarled Claw
description:
Use: A melee attack.
This weapon gains +1 damage and +1 use when it gets a kill.
Damage resets at the end of the adventure.

name: Golden Pickaxe
description:
Use: A melee attack that ignores shield.
If used on static or inanimate objects it destroys them and spawns a Coin.
Spawn a coin on a random tile at the end of each turn.

name: Grappling Hook
description: Pull yourself towards a unit or object.

name: Grenade
description: Use: Throw a grenade that explodes and shreds 5 stacks of random buffs off of whatever it hits.

name: Grip Trainer
description: Use: Gain +1 Strength.

name: Harpy's Claw
description: Use: A melee attack that inflicts Poison 1, Bleed 1, Confusion 1, Weakness 1, and Slow 1.

name: Heavy Mace
description:
-6 Speed
Use: A melee attack with Knockback 2 that deals damage equal to your Strength.
Cleaves and deals double damage to units with Shield.

name: Hell Hook
description: Use: Pull a unit toward you.

name: Hitler's Pistol
description: Use: Fire a shot in a straight line.

name: Holy Grail
description: Use: Heal an adjacent unit or yourself for 5 HP.

Use: A lobbed attack that Freezes units.

Use: A melee attack that inflicts {Status Effect} 1.

(Usable once per battle.)

name: Jitte

description:
Use: A melee attack with Knockback 2.

description: Use: A melee attack with +1 reach that penetrates through units.

name: Laced Needle
description:
Use: A melee attack that inflicts Poison 1.

Use: A ranged attack that inflicts Poison 2.

name: Lighter
description: Use: Inflict Burn 1 on an adjacent unit.

name: Log

Use: A melee attack that inflicts Bruise 2 and Confusion. Become Drowsy after use.

name: Manhole Cover

Brace 2.

name: Meat Bomb
description: Use: Throw a bomb that explodes.

Bosses take 1/6th of their current HP in damage instead.

name: Meat Hook
description:
Use: Pull a unit towards you.
Innate

name: Meat Slugger
description: Use: A melee attack with Knockback 10 that inflicts Bruise.

description:
Use: A laser attack. Gains +5 damage for the rest of the battle each time it's used.

description: Use: A melee attack that inflicts Blind 3 and gives you a random eye trinket if you don't have a trinket equipped.

name: Mini Jetpack
description: Use: Fly to a random tile within a target area. If you land on a unit, explode dealing 5 damage in an area (including to yourself).

description: Use: Throw a mini nuke that makes a HUGE explosion that spawns toxic sludge.

description:
Use: A ranged attack that passes through units and returns to you after you throw it. At its apex, it deals electric damage.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Modded Hairspray
description: Use: Deal fire damage in a cone.

name: Modeling Clay
description: Changes into a different Weapon each time it's used. Lobbed Attack.

name: Molars
description: Use: A low-damage lobbed attack.

name: Mom's Knife
description: Use: Throw a penetrating projectile that returns to you.

name: Mom's Toenail
description: Use: A melee attack.

description:
Becomes 25 coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

name: Money Bag
description:
Becomes 10 coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

name: Money Bag
description:
Becomes 100 coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

name: Money Bag
description:
Becomes 50 coins when you return home.
Use: A melee attack.

name: Monk Fist
description:
You can use your basic attack an extra time each turn.

description: Use: A wide melee attack.

description: Unearth 5 Zombie Kittens within 5 Tiles from you, they each have a 33% Chance of having Madness.

name: Nuclear Gun
description: Use: Deals 40 damage to a target and 20 damage to EVERYTHING ELSE. 20% chance to break on use.

name: Nuclear Knife
description:
Side Quest Item. Use: Melee Attack with damage = charges ({aux}). Permanenetly gains 1 Charge at the end of each turn.
If charges go above 10, this weapon explodes.
Loses half of its charges when it gets a kill.

name: Nuclear Knife (Glowing)
description: Side Quest Item. It's about to explode! Get a kill with this now to quench it.

name: Obsidian Chunk
description:
Use: A melee attack.
This weapon gains +2 damage each time it's used.
Damage resets at the end of the adventure.

name: Ocarina
description: Use: Cast a random musical spell.

name: Odd Remote
description: Cast a random spell.

name: Old Extinguisher

Use: Extinguishes fires in a cone with Knockback 5.

description:
Side Quest Item. All units explode when they die.

name: Party Detonator (Fixed)
description:
Use: Explode a random unit within a target radius.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Paw Shards
description:
Your basic attack inflicts Bleed 1. Gain +1 Bleed each time you use your basic attack.

description:
-2 Speed
Side Quest Item. Use to permanently charm a non-boss enemy. It joins your party.

description:
Use: Summon a swarm of charmed flies.

name: Pickaxe
description:
Use: A melee attack that ignores shield.

description: Use: A melee attack with a 10% chance to inflict Stun.

description: Use: A melee attack that inflicts Weakness 3.

Use: Cast a targeted random spell.

description: Use: Toss a Bomb that explodes at the end of the round.

description: Use: Fires 5 projectiles in a cone.

name: Shovel
description: Use: A melee attack that lobs a unit back 2 tiles and digs up a corpse.

name: Signal Amplifier
description:
Place it on a floating head inside The Rift.
Spawn a random robot miniboss with Madness at the end of the first round.
Use: Energize all robots and give yourself All Stats Up.

name: Six Pack

description: Use: Fire a shot that instakills units and deals 25 damage to bosses.

name: Soul Claw
description:
Use: A melee attack that deals damage equal to the number of uses this has left.
When this weapon kills a unit, it gains +2 uses.

description:
Use: A melee attack. If this weapon damages an allied cat, gain one of their spells at random in your bonus ability slot.
If this weapon downs an ally it becomes Charged for the rest of the battle.

name: Spear of Destiny
description:
Use: A melee attack with +1 reach that penetrates through units.

Use: A ranged attack that inflicts Webbed.
Parasite.

description: Use: A ranged attack that inflicts Webbed.

+1 Strength, -1 Constitution
Cursed.

Use: Spawn a Stacy.

description:
Use: A fire attack that inflicts Burn 5.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Staff of the Underworld
description:
Use: A melee attack with Knockback 1.

name: Steel Ball
description:
Use: Summon an invulnerable Fly familiar.
(Usable once per battle.)

name: Steven (Weapon 1)
description:
Use: A melee attack. If this hits an allied cat, spawn a quarter-sized copy of them with 25% of their stats. The copy is AI controlled.
RELOAD: An allied cat dies.

name: Steven (Weapon 2)
description:
Use: A lobbed attack that inflicts Petrify.
RELOAD: Kill a rock.

name: Steven's Bag of Rocks
description: Use: A melee attack with a chance to repeat that inflicts Bruise.

name: Steven's Bottle
description: Use: A ranged attack that creates a Tar tile.

name: Steven's Gristle
description:
Units don't leave corpses.
Use: A melee attack.
This weapon gains +1 damage and +1 use when it gets a kill.
Damage resets at the end of the adventure.

name: Steven's Shotgun
description: Use: Fires 5 projectiles in a cone. Using this recoils you 10 tiles backwards and Confuses you.

name: Stick
description: Use: A melee attack with +1 reach.

description:
Use: You or a target unit takes an AI controlled bonus turn.

name: Strong Magnet
description: Use: Pull a unit 2 tiles toward you.

description: Use: Fire 5 shots in a straight line.

name: Textbook

name: The Bible
description: Cleanse 1 stack of a Random Debuff from a unit at Melee range. Passive: When you Heal a unit, Heal +1 HP.

description: Use: A melee attack that always crits and inflicts Bleed 10.

description:
Use: Deals 5 damage to anything in your line of sight.

name: The Pact

Take it to the Wall of Flesh in the Caves.
All units die when they get downed.

name: Tina's Larynx
description:
Use: Inflict Fear on all enemies.

name: Toy Gun

description: Use: A melee attack with Knockback 1 that spawns a rock.

-6 Constitution
